name: Pear and Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper – to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the pears and cut into small bite-sized pieces.
2. Halve the cucumbers length-wise and scoop out the seeds with a teaspoon.
3. Slice the cucumber into thin slices.
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and toss.
5. Serve on bed of lettuce leaves.
6. Serves 4 to 6.
Available in finer supermarkets and Asian specialty shops
